name: Enlightify Inc.
summary: Enlightify Inc. (formerly China Green Agriculture Inc.) is a Nevada corporation engaged in research, development, production, and sale of fertilizers and agricultural products in China through subsidiaries Jinong and Gufeng, and VIE Yuxing. Products include humic acid-based compound fertilizers, blended fertilizers, organic compound fertilizers, slow-release fertilizers, and water-soluble fertilizers. Since March 2023, the company also mines Bitcoin in West Texas through subsidiary Antaeus Tech Inc. Fertilizer revenues were $65.4M (86.8% of total) for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025.

products.name: Humic Acid-Based Compound Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Jinong; core fertilizer product line sold across China.

products.name: Compound Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Gufeng; includes blended, organic compound, and slow-release varieties.

products.name: Blended Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Gufeng for agricultural use in PRC markets.

products.name: Organic Compound Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Gufeng; mixed organic-inorganic compound fertilizer for agriculture.

products.name: Slow-Release Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Gufeng; designed for extended nutrient release in crops.

products.name: Highly Concentrated Water-Soluble Fertilizers
products.description: Produced through Gufeng for precision agricultural applications.

products.name: Mixed Organic-Inorganic Compound Fertilizer
products.description: Produced through Gufeng as part of diversified fertilizer product line.

products.name: Agricultural Products (Fruits, Vegetables, Flowers, Seedlings)
products.description: Produced through VIE Yuxing; includes top-grade fruits, vegetables, flowers, and colored seedlings.

products.name: Bitcoin Mining
products.description: Digital asset mining via Antaeus Tech Inc. using Bitmain Antminer S19 Pro machines in West Texas.
